title: Opening for Production Engineer at Greaves Cotton

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Greaves Cotton
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Greaves Cotton in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Greaves Cotton:
Greaves Cotton is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton!
